subcodes.title: Words to Mrs. Hoagg, spoken around Jan. 1914(?)
subcodes.first_line: Individual consciousness is realized after birth here. This is the matrix world for the soul, even as the womb was the matrix world for the body or vehicle. Birth into consciousness of another world begins here, a world for which this physical and material one is but the preparation and foundation.
subcodes.subjects: @the human soul, @soul; spirit after death, @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @second birth
